label: Obsidian Notes
description: Create and manage Markdown files for Obsidian vaults

requirements.name: Obsidian Vault Path
requirements.description: You need to configure your Obsidian vault folder path in settings
requirements.instructions:
1. Go to Settings > Obsidian Vault
2. Enter the path to your Obsidian vault folder
3. Example: /Users/you/Documents/ObsidianVault
